name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

<!-- What use case isn't well-served today? Lead with the problem, not the
     solution. If you've already settled on a design, describe the problem
     it solves before showing the design. -->

## Proposed approach (optional)

<!-- A sketch of how this could work. Code snippets welcome but not
     required at the issue stage. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't pick them. -->

## Boundary check

<!-- CMBS deliberately stays out of certain territory (probe execution,
     observation interpretation, probabilistic belief, hypothesis discovery).
     If the feature might cross those boundaries, flag it here so we can
     discuss whether it belongs in core, an adapter, or out of scope. -->
